statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.

statement.outputFormat: A boolean indicating if the target is found
statement.notes: Use a binary search approach to find the target

examples.explanation: Target not found in the array

hints.text: Use integer division `//` to avoid floating point errors

editorial.title: Binary Search Fix
editorial.intuition: Implement binary search correctly to find the target
editorial.bruteForce: Brute force approach is not efficient for large arrays
editorial.betterSolution: Use binary search to find the target in O(log n) time
editorial.optimalSolution: Implement binary search with correct boundary checks
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: The optimal solution has been proven to work correctly
editorial.dryRun: Run the optimal solution with example inputs
